# platformAddEdge

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformAddEdge mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.platformAddEdge({ input: '<PlatformAddEdgeInput>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run platformAddEdge

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.platformAddEdge({ input: '<PlatformAddEdgeInput>' }).execute();
```
